title: Functional Units of a Basic Computer System
description: A block diagram showing the primary functional units of a computer and their interconnections, illustrating how data and control signals flow between them.
relationships: The Control Unit (CU) directs the operation of all other units by sending control signals over the control bus
The ALU performs calculations and logical operations on data from the registers
Registers provide fast, temporary storage for data being processed by the CPU
The Memory Unit stores instructions and data; it is accessed via the address and data buses
The I/O Interface facilitates communication between the CPU and external devices
The System Bus (comprising Address, Data, and Control lines) is the communication pathway connecting all major components
